focus: frontend card detail modal and board card face enhancements

AC11.notes: Implemented a full-width card detail modal with inline title editing, formatted description preview/editor, labels, dates, checklist progress, activity, and close controls.

AC12.notes: Board cards now expose label dots, due-date badges by status, and checklist mini progress.

AC15.notes: Added a label picker with assignment toggles, assigned checkmarks, and inline preset-color label creation.

AC16.notes: Existing card detail changes now save immediately on blur or change with optimistic local UI updates.

AC17.notes: Modal empty states are covered, but search no-results and loading/saving skeleton states remain.

summary: Completed the rich-cards frontend modal and board-card slice with optimistic edits, richer card summaries, typed client helpers, and updated UI styling.
next_focus: board-level search and filter UI plus column drag-reordering
